description: All planned steps done, all tests passing. Model must work through the full checklist and produce a Status: Complete verdict with explicit Ready to close: reasoning.
input: All 5 planned steps implemented. Tests: 47 passing, 0 failing. Manual smoke test completed. No TODOs remaining. Documentation updated in README. No regressions found.

description: Implementation has TODO comments left in the code from the TDD session. Model must flag these in the verification checklist and return a non-complete verdict with Ready to close: No.
input: Steps 1-4 done, step 5 partially done. Tests passing but there are 3 TODO comments in the implementation: TODO: add retry logic, TODO: handle timeout, TODO: log failure. No documentation updates yet.

description: All code complete and tested but documentation was not updated. Model must catch this in the Verification checklist and reflect it in the Status verdict.
input: All implementation steps complete. Tests: 23 passing. Smoke test done. No TODOs. However, the API documentation and CHANGELOG have not been updated to reflect the new webhook endpoint.
